sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: Sint-Truidense VV is in excellent form, remaining unbeaten in their last 12 matches, including 3 wins and 1 draw in the current season. SV Zulte Waregem, on the other hand, has struggled with consistency, securing only 1 win and 1 draw in their last 4 league matches, alongside a concerning defensive record with no clean sheets in 6 games.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: In the last 5 head-to-head matchups, Sint-Truidense VV holds a slight edge with 3 wins compared to Zulte Waregem's 2. The most recent encounters (2022-2023) resulted in 2-0 victories for each team on their respective home grounds, indicating tight and low-scoring affairs.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Sint-Truidense VV sits 2nd in the league with 8 goals scored and only 3 conceded, showcasing a balanced attack and solid defense. Zulte Waregem, positioned 11th, has scored 5 goals but conceded 7, with weaker possession (42.25%) and pressing stats compared to their opponent.

sections.subtitle: Scoring Patterns
sections.text: Sint-Truidense VV tends to score late, with a significant portion of goals in the 76-90 minute range, while Zulte Waregem also shows late scoring potential but struggles defensively throughout matches. This suggests a game that could be decided in the closing stages.

sections.subtitle: Cards and Corners
sections.text: Both teams have a trend of fewer than 4.5 yellow cards in recent head-to-heads and overall matches, aligning with the referee's average of 3.9 cards per game. Zulte Waregem averages higher corners per game (5.5) compared to Sint-Truidense VV, with home games often seeing over 10.5 total corners.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: The first half between SV Zulte Waregem and Sint-Truidense VV ended in a goalless draw at the Elindus Arena. Neither side managed to break the deadlock despite some promising moments. Sint-Truidense VV appeared more dominant in possession and created more dangerous opportunities, while SV Zulte Waregem struggled to convert their limited chances into real threats. Both teams will need to sharpen their finishing if they are to find the net in the second half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance analysis
halftimeSections.text: Sint-Truidense VV controlled the game with slightly higher possession and significantly more entries into the final third and penalty area compared to their opponents. Their expected goals were also notably higher, indicating they had the better chances to score. SV Zulte Waregem, on the other hand, showed resilience in defense but lacked the cutting edge in attack. Their lower expected goals reflect a lack of quality in the final third, though they managed to win possession in dangerous areas at times.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum shifts
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw fluctuating attacking momentum between the two sides. Early on, both teams traded spells of pressure with neither able to sustain dominance. Sint-Truidense VV took control for a prolonged period in the middle of the half, consistently pushing forward with intent. SV Zulte Waregem responded with a stronger spell towards the latter stages of the half, showing more urgency in attack. However, as the half drew to a close, Sint-Truidense VV regained momentum, finishing with a slight edge in attacking threat.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key players to watch
halftimeSections.text: For SV Zulte Waregem, players like Jeppe Erenbjerg and Thomas Claes showed glimpses of creativity and threat in the first half. Their ability to create openings could be crucial if Zulte Waregem are to turn things around. On the Sint-Truidense VV side, Ilias Sebaoui stands out as a potential game-changer with his involvement in dangerous moves. Ryotaro Ito also made an impact with shots on target and could be pivotal in unlocking the opposition defense.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Discipline and physicality
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw a fair amount of physicality, with SV Zulte Waregem picking up two yellow cards compared to one for Sint-Truidense VV. This suggests a more aggressive approach from the home side, possibly out of frustration due to their inability to create clear chances. Sint-Truidense VV managed to maintain composure better, which allowed them to focus on their attacking structure. Both teams were evenly matched in terms of duels won, indicating a tightly contested battle in midfield.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: The second half is likely to see Sint-Truidense VV continue their attacking intent, given their superior numbers in key areas during the first 45 minutes. They may look to exploit their ability to enter the penalty area more frequently and convert their chances. SV Zulte Waregem will need to improve their efficiency in the final third and capitalize on any counter-attacking opportunities. A tactical adjustment from the home side could be on the cards to disrupt Sint-Truidense VV’s rhythm. Expect a tighter game, but with the away side holding a slight edge.
